channel.title: Obsidian Lake // US Breach + Surveillance Feed
channel.description: Curated rolling feed of significant US data breaches and dragnet-surveillance disclosures. Aggregated from public disclosures, regulatory filings, civil-liberties journalism, and the cypherpunk press. Calm signal, not vendor FUD.
channel.generator: Obsidian Lake Breach + Surveillance Aggregator v1.2

item.title: [BREACH · INFO] Florida County Database Mistake: Election Officials’ Logins Among Exposed Data | UpGuard
item.description:
UpGuard can now disclose that an Amazon S3 storage bucket containing publicly exposed backups of systems representing the intranet and web presence for Martin County, Florida has been secured.
// Category: breach // Severity: info // Sector: gov // Actor: Unattributed // Vector: Under investigation // Records (est.): 3 // $ (est.): $0 // Source: upguard // Original: https://www.upguard.com/breaches/martin-county-florida-election-officials-passwords

item.title: [BREACH · CRITICAL] Home Economics: How Life in 123 Million American Households Was Exposed Online | UpGuard
item.description:
This cloud leak reveals the personal details of 123 million US households, revealing in-depth analysis of their finances sold by credit reporting agency Experian.
// Category: breach // Severity: critical // Sector: tech // Actor: Unattributed // Vector: Under investigation // Records (est.): 123,000,000 // $ (est.): $0 // Source: upguard // Original: https://www.upguard.com/breaches/cloud-leak-alteryx

item.title: [BREACH · CRITICAL] The RNC Files: Inside the Largest US Voter Data Leak | UpGuard
item.description:
UpGuard has discovered an open database containing information on what appear to be approximately 198 million American voters left misconfigured by a GOP analytics firm.
// Category: breach // Severity: critical // Sector: other // Actor: Unattributed // Vector: Misconfiguration // Records (est.): 198,000,000 // $ (est.): $0 // Source: upguard // Original: https://www.upguard.com/breaches/the-rnc-files

item.title: [BREACH · INFO] Out of Commission: How the Oklahoma Department of Securities Leaked Millions of Files | UpGuard
item.description:
A storage server configured for public access exposed millions of files belonging to the Oklahoma Securities Commission.
// Category: breach // Severity: info // Sector: finance // Actor: Unattributed // Vector: Under investigation // Records (est.): 0 // $ (est.): $0 // Source: upguard // Original: https://www.upguard.com/breaches/rsync-oklahoma-securities-commission

item.title: [BREACH · INFO] Double Indemnity: How An Insurer Exposed Its Customers | UpGuard
item.description:
A shared-risk property insurance provider in Maryland left exposed data revealing the personal details of thousands of customers.
// Category: breach // Severity: info // Sector: finance // Actor: Unattributed // Vector: Under investigation // Records (est.): 0 // $ (est.): $0 // Source: upguard // Original: https://www.upguard.com/breaches/nas-leak-mdjia

item.title: [BREACH · INFO] Spy Games: How Booz Allen Hamilton Exposed Pentagon Access Keys | UpGuard
item.description:
While this blog post provides a description of a data exposure discovery involving Booz Allen Hamilton and the US National Geospatial-Intelligence Agency (NGA), this is no longer an active data breach.
// Category: breach // Severity: info // Sector: other // Actor: Unattributed // Vector: Under investigation // Records (est.): 0 // $ (est.): $0 // Source: upguard // Original: https://www.upguard.com/breaches/spy-games-booz-allen-hamilton-pentagon

item.title: [BREACH · INFO] Out of Pocket: How an ISP Exposed Administrative System Credentials | UpGuard
item.description:
ISPs do more than provide internet service for individual customers-- they can also act as part of US critical infrastructure. See how one ISP exposed their administrative and root passwords to the public.
// Category: breach // Severity: info // Sector: telecom // Actor: Unattributed // Vector: Under investigation // Records (est.): 0 // $ (est.): $0 // Source: upguard // Original: https://www.upguard.com/breaches/out-of-pocket-how-an-isp-exposed-administrative-system-credentials

item.title: [BREACH · INFO] Police Procedural: How South Carolina Arrest Records Were Exposed | UpGuard
item.description:
Everyone who depends on tech assumes its risks. The justice system is no exception. See how detailed arrest records for South Carolina were exposed online.
// Category: breach // Severity: info // Sector: other // Actor: Unattributed // Vector: Under investigation // Records (est.): 0 // $ (est.): $0 // Source: upguard // Original: https://www.upguard.com/breaches/spartan-south-carolina-arrest-records-data-exposure

item.title: [BREACH · INFO] The Aggregate IQ Files, Part One: How a Political Engineering Firm Exposed Their Code Base | UpGuard
item.description:
Political data firm AggregateIQ exposed IT assets that raise questions for society about how technology is being used in recent US political history.
// Category: breach // Severity: info // Sector: other // Actor: Unattributed // Vector: Under investigation // Records (est.): 0 // $ (est.): $0 // Source: upguard // Original: https://www.upguard.com/breaches/aggregate-iq-part-one

item.title: [BREACH · CRITICAL] Black Box, Red Disk: How Top Secret NSA and Army Data Leaked Online | UpGuard
item.description:
A sensitive S3 bucket left wide open, containing highly classified 'NOFORN' data, was discovered by the UpGuard team.
// Category: breach // Severity: critical // Sector: other // Actor: Unattributed // Vector: Under investigation // Records (est.): 3,000,000,000 // $ (est.): $0 // Source: upguard // Original: https://www.upguard.com/breaches/cloud-leak-inscom

item.title: [BREACH · INFO] Social Insecurity: Billions of Social Security Number and Passwords | UpGuard
item.description:
UpGuard research found a trove of sensitive information in an exposed Elastic database. Getting to the bottom of what it meant led us down an interesting path.
// Category: breach // Severity: info // Sector: other // Actor: Unattributed // Vector: Under investigation // Records (est.): 0 // $ (est.): $0 // Source: upguard // Original: https://www.upguard.com/breaches/social-insecurity-billions-of-social-security-number-and-passwords

item.title: [BREACH · INFO] California AG Files Lawsuit Over 23andMe Data Breach
item.description:
California Attorney General Rob Bonta has filed a lawsuit against the genetic testing company formerly known as 23andMe over its […]

The post California AG Files Lawsuit Over 23andMe Data Breach appeared first on The HIPAA Journal.

// Category: breach // Severity: info // Sector: healthcare // Actor: Unattributed // Vector: Under investigation // Records (est.): 8,230 // $ (est.): $0 // Source: hipaajournal // Original: https://www.hipaajournal.com/california-ag-23andme-data-breach-lawsuit/

item.title: [BREACH · CRITICAL] California AG Bonta Sues Chrome Holding Co., Formerly Known as 23andMe, Over 2023 Data Breach
[BREACH · CRITICAL] Thousands of Oregon prison files accessed by prison worker
[BREACH · CRITICAL] Medical Billing Company Data Breach Affects 7 Medical Groups
item.description:
The Las Vegas medical billing and coding management company, La Perouse, has announced a data breach that has affected seven […]

The post Medical Billing Company Data Breach Affects 7 Medical Groups appeared first on The HIPAA Journal.

// Category: breach // Severity: critical // Sector: healthcare // Actor: Unattributed // Vector: Under investigation // Records (est.): 7,000,000 // $ (est.): $0 // Source: hipaajournal // Original: https://www.hipaajournal.com/la-perouse-data-breach/

item.title: [BREACH · INFO] Patient Data Exposed in Cyberattacks on Dental Practices
item.description:
Data breaches have been announced by Bridle Trails Family Dentistry, Verber Dental Group, and Bronsky Orthodontics. Across the three incidents, […]

The post Patient Data Exposed in Cyberattacks on Dental Practices appeared first on The HIPAA Journal.

// Category: breach // Severity: info // Sector: healthcare // Actor: Unattributed // Vector: Under investigation // Records (est.): 8,230 // $ (est.): $0 // Source: hipaajournal // Original: https://www.hipaajournal.com/patient-data-exposed-cyberattacks-on-dental-practices/

item.title: [BREACH · HIGH] Family Medicine Centers Pay $2.15M to Resolve Data Breach Lawsuit
item.description:
FMC Services, LLC, which does business as Family Medicine Centers in Texas, has agreed to a $2,150,000 settlement to resolve […]

The post Family Medicine Centers Pay $2.15M to Resolve Data Breach Lawsuit appeared first on The HIPAA Journal.

// Category: breach // Severity: high // Sector: healthcare // Actor: Unattributed // Vector: Under investigation // Records (est.): 2,150,000 // $ (est.): $2,150,000 // Source: hipaajournal // Original: https://www.hipaajournal.com/family-medicine-centers-data-breach-settlement/

item.title: [BREACH · INFO] Russia claims foreign spy agencies hacked officials' phones
item.description:
In a statement, Russia's Federal Security Service (FSB) said it had uncovered what it described as a "large-scale operation" involving malicious software installed on the mobile devices of senior Russian officials.
// Category: breach // Severity: info // Sector: tech // Actor: Unattributed // Vector: Under investigation // Records (est.): 0 // $ (est.): $0 // Source: therecord // Original: https://therecord.media/russia-claims-foreign-spy-agencies-hacked-gov-officials

item.title: [BREACH · INFO] KR: Tving CEO Apologizes for Unprecedented Data Leak
[BREACH · MEDIUM] Singing River Health System: 54K Individuals Affected by December Cyberattack
item.description:
Singing River Health System in Mississippi has issued an update on a cybersecurity incident that was first announced in December […]

The post Singing River Health System: 54K Individuals Affected by December Cyberattack appeared first on The HIPAA Journal.

// Category: breach // Severity: medium // Sector: healthcare // Actor: Unattributed // Vector: Under investigation // Records (est.): 54,000 // $ (est.): $0 // Source: hipaajournal // Original: https://www.hipaajournal.com/singing-river-health-system-54k-individuals-affected-by-december-cyberattack/

item.title: [BREACH · HIGH] $3.3M Settlement Resolves Data Breach Lawsuit Against Mt. Baker Imaging & Northwest Radiologists
item.description:
Mt. Baker Imaging and Northwest Radiologists have agreed to pay $3,300,000 to settle a consolidated class action lawsuit stemming from […]

The post $3.3M Settlement Resolves Data Breach Lawsuit Against Mt. Baker Imaging & Northwest Radiologists appeared first on The HIPAA Journal.

// Category: breach // Severity: high // Sector: healthcare // Actor: Unattributed // Vector: Under investigation // Records (est.): 3,300,000 // $ (est.): $3,300,000 // Source: hipaajournal // Original: https://www.hipaajournal.com/mt-baker-imaging-northwest-radiologists-data-breach-settlement/

item.title: [BREACH · INFO] CISA warns of cyberattacks targeting fuel tank monitoring systems
item.description:
CISA, the FBI, the NSA, the Department of Energy, and other US government partners are warning that hackers are targeting internet-exposed automatic tank gauge (ATG) systems used to monitor fuel and liquid storage tanks across various critical infrastructure sectors. [...]
// Category: breach // Severity: info // Sector: gov // Actor: Unattributed // Vector: Under investigation // Records (est.): 0 // $ (est.): $0 // Source: bleepingcomputer // Original: https://www.bleepingcomputer.com/news/security/cisa-warns-of-cyberattacks-targeting-fuel-tank-monitoring-systems/

item.title: [BREACH · INFO] U.S. sanctions Nobitex crypto exchange used by Iranian ransomware actors
item.description:
The U.S. Treasury's Office of Foreign Assets Control (OFAC) has announced sanctions against Nobitex, Iran's largest cryptocurrency exchange, for facilitating payments related to terrorist activities. [...]
// Category: breach // Severity: info // Sector: other // Actor: Unattributed // Vector: Ransomware // Records (est.): 0 // $ (est.): $0 // Source: bleepingcomputer // Original: https://www.bleepingcomputer.com/news/security/the-us-sanctions-nobitex-crypto-exchange-used-by-ransomware/

item.title: [BREACH · INFO] Healthcare Data Breach Statistics – Updated for 2026
item.description:
The HIPAA Journal has compiled healthcare data breach statistics from October 2009, when the Department of Health and Human Services […]

The post Healthcare Data Breach Statistics – Updated for 2026 appeared first on The HIPAA Journal.

// Category: breach // Severity: info // Sector: healthcare // Actor: Unattributed // Vector: Under investigation // Records (est.): 8,230 // $ (est.): $0 // Source: hipaajournal // Original: https://www.hipaajournal.com/healthcare-data-breach-statistics/
